case_title: ROBERT R CALLAN VS. ANASTASIA HOCKINSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-14-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT R. CALLEN & DEFENDANT ANASTASIA HOCKINSON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF IS IN THE PROCESS OF ATTEMPTING TO SUBPOENA DOCUMENTS FROM AIRBNB REGARDING THE PRESENT ACTION. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D514).
